1.name: Scratch
1.effect: Scratch the opponent with sharp claws.

2.name: Tackle
2.effect: Charge at the opponent with a full-body tackle.

3.name: Spare
3.effect: Attack the opponent in restrain to prevent the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

4.name: Quick Strike
4.effect: Lunges at the opponent quickly before the target can react. This move has a +1 priority.

5.name: Bite
5.effect: Bite the opponent with vicious fangs. This move has a 20% chance to reduce the target's Defense stat.

6.name: Tail Slap
6.effect: Slap the opponent with a tail. This move has a 10% chance of causing the target to flinch.

7.name: Horn Attack
7.effect: Jab at the opponent with a sharply pointed horn. This move has a 20% chance to reduce the target's Attack stat.

8.name: Double Slap
8.effect: Slap the opponent twice in one turn.

9.name: Decisive Strike
9.effect: Look for an oponening and strike consistently. This move ignores the stat changes on the opponent.

10.name: Flurry Strike
10.effect: Strike the opponent in a flurry. Hit 2-5 times in one turn.

11.name: Flail
11.effect: Flail around and aimlessly attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

12.name: Headbutt
12.effect: Recklessly headbutt the opponent that also hurt the user by a quarter of the damage dealt. This move also has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch.

13.name: Dizzy Punch
13.effect: Hit the opponent with a rhythmically punch. This move also has a 10% chance of leaving the target confused.

14.name: Crush Claw
14.effect: Slash the opponent with hard and sharp claws. This move also lowers the target's Defense stat.

15.name: Body Slam
15.effect: Crash into your opponent with a full-body tackle. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with paralysis.

16.name: Take Down
16.effect: Recklessly slam into the opponent but also hurt the user by a quarter of the damage dealt. This move has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch.

17.name: Retaliate
17.effect: Revenge for a fainted ally. This move's power is doubled if one of the user's party members fainted last turn.

18.name: Rough Combat
18.effect: Fight the opponent up close with a rough style. This move lowers the user's Defense if used in succession.

19.name: Reckless Charge
19.effect: Recklessly rush and tackle the opponent. If this move lands and the opponent loses HP, the user also gets hurt by a third of the damage dealt.

20.name: Final Act
20.effect: Faint after using this move, even if there is no target.

21.name: Colossal Crash
21.effect: Charge at the opponent using every bit of its power. The user cannot move on the next turn.

22.name: Echo
22.effect: Attack the opponent with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by anyone on the field, its power is boosted.

23.name: Screech
23.effect: Attack the opponent with a screeching sound. This move also lowers the target's Defense stat.

24.name: Snore
24.effect: This move can only be used if the user is asleep. The harsh noise from it also has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch.

25.name: Ancient Hymn
25.effect: Sing an ancient song that shakes the opponent's heart. This move also has a 10% chance to induce sleep.

26.name: Weather Orb
26.effect: This move's type and power change depending on the weather. The move's type changes to ice during hail, water during rain, earth during sandstorm, fire during sunny day and the power doubles under any of these weather conditions.

27.name: Hidden Power
27.effect: Damage the opponent with a mysterious power. This move changes type to deal supereffective damage to the target.

28.name: Sonic Boom
28.effect: Release a destructive sound wave that shocks the opponent.

29.name: Outcry
29.effect: Attack in an uproar for 2 turns. During that time, no one can fall asleep, and those who are already asleep on the battle will be woken up.

30.name: Boomburst
30.effect: Attack everything around the user with the destructive power of explosive sound.

31.name: Super Nova
31.effect: Attack the opponent with a powerful and destructive blast. The user cannot move on the next turn.

32.name: Dodge
32.effect: Dodge upcoming attack(s), but reduce success rate by 50% if used consecutively with any other evasion moves.

33.name: Guard
33.effect: Guard upcoming attack(s), but reduce success rate by 50% if used consecutively with any other evasion moves.

34.name: Rest
34.effect: Rest for 2 turns. Each turn restores the user's HP by 50% and Stamina by 25%. This move also removes all status condition.

35.name: Tickle
35.effect: Tickle the target into laughing, lowering its Special Defense stat.

36.name: Confide
36.effect: Tell the opponent a secret and make the target loses its ability to concentrate. This move lowers the target's Special Attack stat.

37.name: Constrict
37.effect: Use strategical position to restrict the moving space of the opponent. This move lowers the target's Speed stat.

38.name: Growl
38.effect: Let out a growl that lowers the opponent(s)' Attack stats.

39.name: Leer
39.effect: Give out an intimidating leer that lowers the opponent(s)' Defense stats.

40.name: Howl
40.effect: Howl to increase the spirit, raising the user's Attack stat.

41.name: Withdraw
41.effect: Withdraw into a hard shell, raising the user's Defense stat.

42.name: Accelerate
42.effect: Accelerate to boost the user's Speed stat.

43.name: Copycat
43.effect: Copy the move used immediately before the user. If no moves have been used, this move will fail.

44.name: Shield
44.effect: Create a shield to reduce damage from physical attacks for 5 turns.

45.name: Barrier
45.effect: Create a barrier to reduce damage from special attacks for 5 turns.

46.name: Muscle Up
46.effect: Tense the muscles to bulk up the body. This move raises the user's Attack stat and Defense stat.

47.name: Battle Dance
47.effect: Uplift the fighting spirit with a battle dance. This move boosts the user's Attack stat and Speed stat.

48.name: Rallying Cry
48.effect: Let out a powerful cry to uplift the spirit. This move sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

49.name: Shell Break
49.effect: Break out of the shell to drastically raise the user's Speed stat, but lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense stats.

50.name: Endow
50.effect: Switch place with an ally in waiting and pass along any stat changes.

51.name: Bind
51.effect: Bind down the opponent to prevent the target from fleeing. The user also cannot switch.

52.name: Endure
52.effect: Survive any attack during this turn with at least 1 HP, but reduce success rate by 50% if used consecutively with any other evasion moves.

53.name: Assist
53.effect: Assist an ally by boosting the power if that ally's attack in the same turn. This move has a +5 priority.

54.name: Roar
54.effect: Scare off the target, causing a different opponent to be dragged out.

55.name: Substitute
55.effect: Create a substitute using a quarter of HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

56.name: Sing
56.effect: Sing a soothing lullbaby to put the opponent to sleep.

57.name: Recover
57.effect: Regenerate the cells to restore own HP by up to half of the max HP.

58.name: Refresh
58.effect: The user rests to cure itself of poisoning, burn, freeze or paralysis.

59.name: Pester
59.effect: The user swarms the opponent(s), lowering their Special Attack stats.

60.name: String Shot
60.effect: Bound the target with silk blown from the user's mouth that harshly lowers the target's Speed stat.

61.name: Bug Buzz
61.effect: Generate a damaging sound wave by vibration. This move has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense stat.

1001.name: Leaf Blade
1001.effect: Attack the opponent with a hardened leave.

1002.name: Vine Whip
1002.effect: Strike the opponent with a slender, whip-like vine to inflict damage.

1003.name: Leaf Razor
1003.effect: Attack the opponent with razor sharp leaves. This move has 10% critical hit chance.

1004.name: Seed Pellets
1004.effect: Attack the opponent by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits 2-5 times in a row.

1005.name: Fury Cutter
1005.effect: Slash the opponent with scythe-like attack. Consecutive success uses of this move increases the power by 5 each time (Max. 30).

1006.name: Foliate
1006.effect: Pelt the opponent with flower petals and leaves. This move also has a 10% chance of lowering the target's accuracy.

1007.name: Forest Glide
1007.effect: Glide through the forest to strike at the opponent. If the battle takes place in Forest Terrain, this move has +1 priority.

1008.name: Thistle Slash
1008.effect: Hack at the opponent with prickly stems. This move has a 20% chance of landing a critical hit.

1009.name: Power Whip
1009.effect: Violently whirl vines, tentacles or the like to lash the opponent. This move also has a 20% of causing the target to flinch.

1010.name: Thorn Slam
1010.effect: Slam the opponent with hard thorns to inflict heavy damage. This move also lowers the user's Attack stat.

1011.name: Timber Whack
1011.effect: Slam the opponent with hard rugged body to deal serious damage. If this move lands and the opponent loses HP, the user also gets hurt by a third of the damage dealt.

1012.name: Pine Needles
1012.effect: Shoot pine needles at the opponent.

1013.name: Leaf Barrage
1013.effect: Blast the target with sharp leaves. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

1014.name: Enchanted Leaves
1014.effect: Scatter enchanted leaves on the target. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Special Attack stat.

1015.name: Grassy Blast
1015.effect: Draw power from nature and blast at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance to cause the target to flinch.

1016.name: Life Drain
1016.effect: Drain the opponent's HP, and restore half of that to the user.

1017.name: Vine Tangle
1017.effect: Snare the opponent with a vine and trip it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

1018.name: Nature Force
1018.effect: Use the power of nature to unlease a raging thrash to the surrounding area, hitting both foes and allies.

1019.name: Solar Beam
1019.effect: Gather light on the first turn, then blast a bundled beam on the next. This move does not need to charge on the first turn if the weather is sunny day. Power is halved if it's any other weather.

1020.name: Bloom Doom
1020.effect: Collect energy from plants and attack the opponent with full force. The user can't move on the next turn.

1021.name: Photosynthesis
1021.effect: Restore the user's HP by 25%. During harsh sunlight, this move restores 50% instead.

1022.name: Sapping Seed
1022.effect: Plant a seed on the opponent. It steals some HP from the target every turn.

1023.name: Fungus Curse
1023.effect: Cast a spell that curses the opponent, harshly lowering the target's Special Defense stat.

1024.name: Snore Spore
1024.effect: Put the opponent to sleep with a cloud of sleep-inducing spores.

1025.name: Stun Spore
1025.effect: Paralyse the opponent with a cloud of statically charged spores.

1026.name: Toxic Spore
1026.effect: Poison the opponent with a cloud of toxic infused spores.

1027.name: Ingrain
1027.effect: Lay roots that restore the user's own HP by 1/16 of the max HP every turn. The user can't switch out due to being rooted.

1028.name: Wonder Herb
1028.effect: Administer a special herb to both on and off the field allies and cleanse them off their status ailments.

1029.name: Deadly Blossom
1029.effect: Stab the opponent with the user's deadly tail. If the user successfully hits the target before it can move, the target will also be poisoned.

2001.name: Spark
2001.effect: Emit sparks of fire and strike at the opponent.

2002.name: Incinerate
2002.effect: Raze opponent with a fire attack. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

2003.name: Flame Charge
2003.effect: Charge at the opponent in a cloak of fire. Successful hit will raise the user's Attack stat.

2004.name: Flame Flicker
2004.effect: Charge at the opponent after cloaking in fire. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with a burn. The user thaws out if it is frozen.

2005.name: Fire Fang
2005.effect: Bite the opponent with flame-cloaked fangs. This move has a 20% chance to reduce the target's Defense stat and 10% chance to leave a burn.

2006.name: Fiery Claw
2006.effect: Slash the opponent with a blazing claw. This move has a 10% chance of landing a critical hit and 10% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

2007.name: Blaze Punch
2007.effect: Punch the opponent with a flaming first. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

2008.name: Flaming Kick
2008.effect: Launch a flaming kick at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

2009.name: Inferno Edge
2009.effect: Focus bitter feelings toward the world of the lviing into a slashing attach. The user's HP is restored by up to half of the damage dealt to the target.

2010.name: Wild Fire
2010.effect: Trap the target inside a wild vortex of fire that inflicts damage for 3-5 turns.

2011.name: Raging Flame
2011.effect: The user ignites itself and charge at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of leaving the target with a burn but also hurts the user by a third of the damage dealt.

2012.name: Sacred Fire
2012.effect: Raze the opponent with a mystical fire of great intensity. This move has a 50% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

2013.name: Fire Ball
2013.effect: Blast a fire ball at the opponent.

2014.name: Fire Breath
2014.effect: Breathe out a wave of fire at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

2015.name: Fire Blast
2015.effect: Release a fiery blast at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

2016.name: Heat Wave
2016.effect: Exhale hot breath on the opposing field. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target(s) Special Defense stat.

2017.name: Flame Burst
2017.effect: Breath out bursting flame at the opponent. This move also deals half of the damage to the opponents next to the target as well.

2018.name: Magma Storm
2018.effect: Trap the opponent inside a maelstrom of fire that inflicts damage for 3-5 turns.

2019.name: Eruption
2019.effect: Release magma blasts into the surrounding area, dealing damage to both foes and allies.

2020.name: Blue Flare
2020.effect: Engulf the opponent in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense stat.

2021.name: Scorching Fire
2021.effect: Use all of the fire power to attack the opponent. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Special Attack stat.

2022.name: Blast Burn
2022.effect: Raze the opponent with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. The user can't move on the next turn.

2023.name: Sun Dance
2023.effect: Intensify the sun for 5 turns. The sunlight powers up Fire-type atacks and lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

2024.name: Ignite
2024.effect: Shoot a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

2025.name: Combustion
2025.effect: The user kindle its flames to raise both Special Attack and Special Defense stats.

2026.name: Overheat
2026.effect: The user gathers all the fire power to surpass its own limit. This move drastically raises the user's Special Attack stat but costs half of the user's max HP.

2027.name: Ember Cutter
2027.effect: The user ignites its sharp claws or fangs and slash at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat and 20% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

3001.name: Plunge
3001.effect: Plunge the opponent into the water.

3002.name: Clamp
3002.effect: Clamp and squeeze the opponent with a very thick and sturdy shell. This move prevents both the user and the opponent from switching out.

3003.name: Aqua Jet
3003.effect: Lunge at the target like a jet. This move deals double damage if the user is under the water.

3004.name: Submerge
3004.effect: Dive under the water and attack the next turn. The user becomes untargetable by all non-Electric typed moves during this turn.

3005.name: Geyser
3005.effect: Slam into the opponent with full-force blast of water. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

3006.name: Torrent Climb
3006.effect: Hit the opponent with a blow packing the power of fish travelling up waterfalls.

3007.name: Razor Shell
3007.effect: Cut the opponent with sharp shell to inflict damage. This move has a 20% chance of reducing the target's Defense stat.

3008.name: Tide Rush
3008.effect: Swamp on a giant wave to strike the opponent.

3009.name: Surging Strikes
3009.effect: Strike the opponent with a flowing motion of water 3 times in a row. This move has a 100% critical hit chance.

3010.name: Tidal Twister
3010.effect: Trap the opponent inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflict damage for 3-5 turns.

3011.name: Wave Crash
3011.effect: Shroud in water and slam into the target with the whole body. This move hurts the user by a third of the damage dealt.

3012.name: Water Gun
3012.effect: Blast at the opponent with a shot of water.

3013.name: Water Bomb
3013.effect: Attack the opponent with a strong blast of water. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target in confusion.

3014.name: Chilling Water
3014.effect: Shower the opponent with chilling cold water. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target frozen.

3015.name: Bubble Burst
3015.effect: Splash the opponent with a giant water bubble. If targeting a foe, the harsh torrent will hurt them. If targeting an ally, cleansing water will soothe and heal them.

3016.name: Maroon
3016.effect: Wash the opponent(s) with an enourmous wave of water. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Attack stat.

3017.name: Scald
3017.effect: Shoot boiling water at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of leaving the target with a burn. This move also thaws the target.

3018.name: Aqua Blast
3018.effect: Summon a massive amount of water and blast it at the opponent in full force.

3019.name: Tsunami
3019.effect: Set off a tsunami that drowns everyone around the user, foes and allies.

3020.name: Hydro Cannon
3020.effect: Blast the opponent with a huge volume of water launched under great pressure. This move also has a 20% chance of flinching the target.

3021.name: Origin Pulse
3021.effect: Fire countless beams of brilliant blue water from the deep at the opponent. The user can't move on the next turn.

3022.name: Rain Fall
3022.effect: Summon a heavy rain that falls for 5 turns. The rain powers up Water-type moves by 50% and lowers the power of Fire-type moves by 50%.

3023.name: Aqua Veil
3023.effect: The user envelopes itself in a veil made of water. This move restores 1/16 of the user's max HP each turn.

3024.name: Holy Water
3024.effect: Scatter pure water around and restore the HP of the user and its ally on the field.

3025.name: Drench
3025.effect: Shoot a torrent of water that changes the target's type into Water for 3-5 turns.

3026.name: Flowing Barrier
3026.effect: Create a water barrier to surround the body, protecting the user from the next damaging move(s). If used successfully, this move recovers 1/8 of the user's HP. The success rate is reduced by 50% if used consecutively with any other evasion moves.

4001.name: Zap
4001.effect: Surround the body with electric and zap the opponent.

4002.name: Tase
4002.effect: Stun the opponent with a small jolt that always leaves the target with paralysis.

4003.name: Thunder Fang
4003.effect: Bite the opponent with electrified fangs. This move has a 20% chance to reduce the target's Defense stat and 10% chance to paralyse the target.

4004.name: Thunder Claw
4004.effect: Slash the opponent with an electrified claw. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with paralysis.

4005.name: Thunder Punch
4005.effect: Punch the opponent with an electrified first. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with paralysis.

4006.name: Lightning Leap
4006.effect: Leap at the opponent like a quick zap, then switch place with an ally waiting in party.

4007.name: Lightning Strike
4007.effect: Surrounding self with electricity and strike at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with paralysis.

4008.name: Thunder Clap
4008.effect: Throw down a giant thunderbolt. This move has a 20% chance of flinching the target.

4009.name: Volt Tackle
4009.effect: Electricfy yourself and recklessly charge into the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of leaving the target with paralysis but also hurts the user by a third of the damage dealt.

4010.name: Giga Volt
4010.effect: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

4011.name: Jolt
4011.effect: Attack the opponent with a jolt of electricity.

4012.name: Shock Wave
4012.effect: Strike the opponent with a wave of electricity. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with paralysis.

4013.name: Power Surge
4013.effect: Attack the opponent with an electric charge. The residual electricy raises the user's Special Attack stat.

4014.name: Guided Bolt
4014.effect: Zap the opponent with perfect accuracy. This move almost never misses.

4015.name: Electro Cage
4015.effect: Trap the opponent inside a cage of sparking electricity that inflicts damage for 3-5 turns.

4016.name: Kinetic Burst
4016.effect: Attack the opponent and draw out the target's power. This move regains 1/4 of the damage dealt as Stamina.

4017.name: Lightning Bolt
4017.effect: Summon a strong thunderbolt to strike at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with paralysis.

4018.name: Discharge
4018.effect: Strike everything around the user by letting loose a flare of electricity.

4019.name: Thunder Storm
4019.effect: Summon a great storm to strike at the opponent. This move has a 30% chance of leaving the target with paralysis. If the weather is Rainy Day, this move does not check accuracy, but if it's any Sunny Day, this move's accuracy is only 50%.

4020.name: Plasma Burst
4020.effect: Strike the opponent by focusing a high voltage of electricity in a single target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Special Attack stat.

4021.name: Electrify
4021.effect: Launch a weak jolt of electricity that paralyses the opponent.

4022.name: Charge
4022.effect: The user becomes charged, raising the user's Speed stat and doubles the power of the next Electric-type move it uses.

4023.name: Energise
4023.effect: Build up electric charge to raise the user's Special Attack and Special Defense stats.

4024.name: Polarity Shift
4024.effect: Manipulate magnetic energy that lowers the user's Speed stat, but drastically raises the user's Special Defense stat.

4025.name: Eerie Impulse
4025.effect: Generate an eerie impulse to expose the opponent. This move harshly lowers the target's Special Attack stat.

4026.name: Magnetic Field
4026.effect: Create a magnetic field that levitates both foes and allies on the field for 5 turns.

5001.name: Peck
5001.effect: Jab the opponent with a sharply pointed beak.

5002.name: Drill Peck
5002.effect: Strike the opponent with a sharp beak acting as a drill. This move has a 10% chance of landing a critical hit.

5003.name: Scavenge
5003.effect: Swoop down and strike the opponent. This move has a 25% chance of stealing the opponent's item.

5004.name: Aerial Assault
5004.effect: Confound the opponent with speed, then slash. This attack has a +1 priority.

5005.name: Winged Blitz
5005.effect: Slam the opponent with both wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

5006.name: Skyward Glide
5006.effect: Nimbly strike the opponent. This move does double the damage if the user isn't holding an item.

5007.name: Soaring Strike
5007.effect: Strike the opponent while soaring into the sky. This move has a 20% of raising the user's Speed stat.

5008.name: Sky Drop
5008.effect: Grab the opponent and fly up into the sky on the first turn, then drop the target on the next turn. If the target is heavier than 200kg or a Wind type, this move will fail.

5009.name: Valiant Wing
5009.effect: Plummet down onto the opponent below and crash into it. This move deals 25% recoil damage to the user.

5010.name: Dragon Descend
5010.effect: Attack the opponent by dropping out of the sky at high speed. This move lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense stats.

5011.name: Gust
5011.effect: Whip up a gust of wind and launch it at the opponent.

5012.name: Air Slash
5012.effect: Slash the opponent with a wave of air.

5013.name: Air Whip
5013.effect: Whiplash your opponent with high speed wind. This move has a 10% chance of flinching the target.

5014.name: Air Blade
5014.effect: Attack the opponent with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This move has a 20% chance of landing a critical hit.

5015.name: Jet Stream
5015.effect: Batter the opponent with turbulent gusts. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Speed stat.

5016.name: Aero Blast
5016.effect: Attack the opponent with fierce wind. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target with confusion.

5017.name: Cyclone
5017.effect: Wrap the opponent in a powerful storm. This move will trap the opponent and deal 1/8 of the target's maximum HP per turn.

5018.name: Hurricane
5018.effect: Stir up a hurricane to attack the surrounding area, including foes and allies.

5019.name: Cloud Cutter
5019.effect: Send out powerful air blades to cut the cloud. This move sharply reduces the target's Evasion stat.

5020.name: Bleakwind Storm
5020.effect: Attack the opponent with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This move has a 10% chance of freezing the target and 20% chance of lowering the target's Speed stat.

5021.name: Sky Splitter
5021.effect: The user concentrates all the air from surrounding area and fires a single air blade that can split the sky. This move has a 30% chance of flinching the target.

5022.name: Tailwind
5022.effect: Whip up a turbulent whirlwind that boost the Speed stats of itself and its allies for 4 turns.

5023.name: Defog
5023.effect: Use strong wind to blow away the opponents' barriers and shields. This move also lowers the opponent(s)' Evasive stats.

5024.name: Roost
5024.effect: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by half of its max HP.

5025.name: Quick Feet
5025.effect: Use faster footwork to raise the user's Evasion stat.

5026.name: Avian Ruffle
5026.effect: Cover the opponent's body with a mass of feathers that lowers the target's Accuracy and Speed stats.

5027.name: Second Wind
5027.effect: Kick up a burst of wind to soar higher. This move sharply raises the user's Speed stat.

6001.name: Sand Attack
6001.effect: Hurl sand at the opponent to lower the target's Accuracy.

6002.name: Burrow
6002.effect: Burrow into the ground and attack the next turn. The user becomes untargetable by all non-Earth typed moves during this turn.

6003.name: Ground Stomp
6003.effect: Strongly stomp down on the ground to strike everything around the user, foes and allies. This move lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

6004.name: Rock Fall
6004.effect: Hurl large boulders at the opponent(s) to inflict damage. This move has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch.

6005.name: Quake Punch
6005.effect: Strike the target with a powerful punch. This move has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch.

6006.name: Landslide
6006.effect: Trigger a landslide to bury the target. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Speed stat.

6007.name: Earthquake
6007.effect: Set off an earthquake that strikes everyone around the user, foes and allies.

6008.name: Stone Edge
6008.effect: Strike the target with sharp stones. This move has a 30% chance of landing a critical hit.

6009.name: Tectonic Crush
6009.effect: Engulf the target in a massive shockwave from tectonic activity. This move has a 30% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

6010.name: Mud Bomb
6010.effect: Hurl a blob of mud at the target to deal damage. This move has a 10% chance of lowering the target's accuracy.

6011.name: Quicksand
6011.effect: Trap the opponent in quicksand, dealing damage and harshly reducing the target's Speed stat.

6012.name: Mudslide
6012.effect: Sends a rushing wave of mud at the opponent, has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Speed stat.

6013.name: Erosion
6013.effect: Gradually wear down the opponent. This move deals 20% increase damage on subsequent hits.

6014.name: Dust Devil
6014.effect: Summon a small tornado of dust and debris to strike the target.

6015.name: Seismic Wave
6015.effect: Send out a wave of seismic energy that damages all opposing foes.

6016.name: Sandstorm
6016.effect: Whip up a fierce sandstorm that damages all combatants for several turns.

6017.name: Sand Trap
6017.effect: Create a trap of shifting sands that makes the opponent unable to escape.

6018.name: Terra Shield
6018.effect: Summon a protective barrier of earth power that reduces damage from physical attacks for several turns.

6019.name: Rock Armour
6019.effect: Harden the user's body with rock, sharply increasing the user's Defense stat.

6020.name: Sharp Spikes
6020.effect: Send sharp spikes to the opposing field, dealing damage to all non-Wind typed opponents when they switch in.

6021.name: Floating Stones
6021.effect: Send floating stones to the opposing field, dealing damage to all non-Earth typed opponents when they switch in.

7001.name: Iron Claw
7001.effect: Slash the opponent with a harden claw. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

7002.name: Bullet Punch
7002.effect: Deliver a fast punch with bullet-like speed. This move has a +1 priority.

7003.name: Iron Tail
7003.effect: Slam the opponent with a steel-hard tail. This move has a 20% chance of reducing the target's Defense stat by one stage.

7004.name: Steel Wing
7004.effect: Strike the opponent with hard, steel wings. This move has a 10% chance of raising the user's Attack stat.

7005.name: Power Ball
7005.effect: Roll towards the opponent like a powerball. If it misses, the user is hurt instead for 25% of the maximum HP.

7006.name: Heavy Bash
7006.effect: Bash the target heavily with a harden body part. This move has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch.

7007.name: Heavy Slam
7007.effect: Slam into the target with a heavy body. The more the user outweights the target, the greater the move's power.

7008.name: Steel Crusher
7008.effect: Crush the opponent with a force that can bend steel. This move has 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

7009.name: Steel Blade
7009.effect: Slash the target with a blade of steel. This move has a 20% chance of landing a critial hit.

7010.name: Iron Spike
7010.effect: Strike the opponent with a sharp iron spike. This move has a 10% chance of causing the target to flinch.

7011.name: Comet Smash
7011.effect: Hit the target with a powerful, comet-like punch. This move has a 20% chance of raising the user's Attack stat.

7012.name: Magnet Bomb
7012.effect: Launch a magnetic bomb that never misses.

7013.name: Steel Scraps
7013.effect: Hurl sharp steel scraps at the opponent. The target will take 50% of the damage one more time on the next turn.

7014.name: Iron Shot
7014.effect: Fire a projectile of molten iron at the target. This move has a 10% chance of burning the target.

7015.name: Steel Surge
7015.effect: Blast the target with a wave of sharp steel energy. This move has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense stat.

7016.name: Metal Burst
7016.effect: Unlease a burst of damaged metal parts. This move hits both foes and allies alike, with a 10% chance of lowering the targets' Speed stat.

7017.name: Lustre Cannon
7017.effect: Fire a burst of light energy from steel. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense. After using the move, the user's Special Attack will be lowered.

7018.name: Meteor Shower
7018.effect: Summon a rain of meteors onto the opposing field. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Special Attack stat.

7019.name: Iron Wall
7019.effect: Harden the body like an iron wall to sharply raise the user's Defense stat.

7020.name: Chompers
7020.effect: Set a trap with iron chompers. All non-Metal typed opponents will take damage when switching in.

7021.name: Gear Up
7021.effect: Enhance the user's gear. This move raises the user's Attack and Special Attack stats.

7022.name: Gear Grind
7022.effect: Hit the target with rotating gears. This move strikes twice.

8001.name: Snowball
8001.effect: Throw a snowball at the target.

8002.name: Ice Shard
8002.effect: Hurl a shard of ice at the target.

8003.name: Ice Punch
8003.effect: Punch the opponent with an icy first. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target frozen.

8004.name: Frost Fang
8004.effect: Bite the opponent with frosty fangs. This move has a 20% chance to reduce the target's Defense stat and 10% chance to freeze the target.

8005.name: Icicle Spear
8005.effect: Launch sharp icicles at the target, hitting 2-5 times.

8006.name: Glacial Spike
8006.effect: Strike the target with a giant icicle. This move has a 10% chance of causing the target to flinch.

8007.name: Subzero Slam
8007.effect: A high-impact slam infused with freezing energy. This move has a 10% chance of paralysing the target and a 10% chance of lowering the target's Speed stat.

8008.name: Artic Impact
8008.effect: Charge at the opponent with immense force, shrouded in a chilling aura. This move has a 20% chance of causing the target to flinch.

8009.name: Icy Wind
8009.effect: Release a chilling wind that hits all opponents and lowers their Speed stat.

8010.name: Frost Breath
8010.effect: Exhale a chilling breath at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of freezing the target.

8011.name: Chill Blast
8011.effect: Rapidly cool the opponent, with a 10% chance of freezing the target. This move is super-effective against Water-typed target.

8012.name: Cold Snap
8012.effect: A sudden burst of freezing air that has a 10% chance of freezing the target and 10% chance of lowering the target's Speed stat.

8013.name: Cryo Beam
8013.effect: Shoot a beam of frosty ice at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of leaving the target frozen.

8014.name: Blizzard
8014.effect: Summon a massive blizzard to damage everyone on the field, allies and foes alike.

8015.name: Permafrost
8015.effect: Envope the opponent in permafrost. This move will harshly lower the target's Speed stat.

8016.name: Frost Nova
8016.effect: Unlease a burst of powerful freezing energy on the opponent. The user cannot move in the next turn.

8017.name: Hailstorm
8017.effect: Summon a hailstorm that damages all combatants for several turns.

8018.name: Frost Armour
8018.effect: Cover the user in a layer of ice. This move boosts the user's Defense stat.

8019.name: Snow Cloak
8019.effect: Envelop the user in a cloak of snow. This move boosts the user's Special Defense stat.

8020.name: Ice Wall
8020.effect: Raise a barrier of ice that protect the user and allies by reducing all Ice-typed attacks from opponents by 50%.

9001.name: Pursuit
9001.effect: Chase after the opponent and inflict double damage if the target switches out.

9002.name: Feint
9002.effect: Attack the opponent and ignore evasion moves such as Dodge or Guard. It also lifts the effects of those moves.

9003.name: Revenge
9003.effect: Wait 1 turn then deal double the damage taken on next turn.

9004.name: Shadow Claw
9004.effect: Slash the opponent with a claw made from shadow. This move has a 10% critical hit chance.

9005.name: Shadow Sneak
9005.effect: Sneak in the dark and attack the next turn. The user becomes untargetable by all non-Light typed moves during this turn.

9006.name: Sucker Punch
9006.effect: Strike the target with a surprise punch before they can attack. This move has a +2 priority and only works if the target is about to use a move.

9007.name: Midnight Raid
9007.effect: Attack the target using the surrounding darkness. This move deals 50% less damage under the sun, but has a 50% chance of landing a critical hit when used at night.

9008.name: Eclipse Strike
9008.effect: Strike at the opponent with the borrowed power of eclipse. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

9009.name: Phantom Force
9009.effect: Surround the body with a swirl of dark energy then strike at the opponent. This move has 20% chance of lowering the target's Attack stat.

9010.name: Void Crush
9010.effect: Crush the target with immense dark energy from the void. This move has a 30% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

9011.name: Dread Wave
9011.effect: Unlease a wave of dread on an opponent. This move has a 10% chance of paralysing the target.

9012.name: Dark Pulse
9012.effect: Emit a pulse of dark energy at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense.

9013.name: Umbra Beam
9013.effect: Fire a concentrated beam of darkness. This move has a 20% chance of causing confusion to the target.

9014.name: Nightmare
9014.effect: Haunt the sleeping opponent. This move only works if the target is asleep.

9015.name: Sinister Shade
9015.effect: Embrace the opponent with a wave of sinister energy. This move has a 20% chance to lower either the target's Special Attack or Special Defense stat.

9016.name: Abyssal Wrath
9016.effect: Release the hidden power from the abyss at the opponent. The user will have their Defense and Special Defense stats harshly reduced before using the move.

9017.name: Glare
9017.effect: Frighten the target with a scary face to lower the target's Speed stat.

9018.name: Stalk
9018.effect: Stalk the opponent, allowing the next move to have +1 priority and 50% critical hit chance.

9019.name: Provoke
9019.effect: Taunt the opponent, causing the target to only be able to use attack moves for three turns.

9020.name: Taunt
9020.effect: The user draws attention to itself, making all opposing opponents take aim only at the user.

9021.name: Reprise
9021.effect: For the next 3 turns, the target is forced to repeat its last move used.

9022.name: Blackout
9022.effect: Plunge the area into darkness. This move lowers the Accuracy stat for everyone around the user, foes and allies alike.

9023.name: Shadow Veil
9023.effect: Envelop the user in shadows. This move raises the user's Evasion stat.

10001.name: Glitter
10001.effect: Attack the opponent while infused with light.

10002.name: Daybreak Strike
10002.effect: A strong light-based attack that deals double damage if it's sunny.

10003.name: Shimmer Strike
10003.effect: A quick, light-infused strike. This move has a +1 priority.

10004.name: Photon Blade
10004.effect: Create a blade of pure light that slices through the opponent's defense. This move will ignore the target's Defense stat.

10005.name: Lustrous Cut
10005.effect: Intensify the light at a single line to cut through the opponent.

10006.name: Stellar Blade
10006.effect: Emits a powerful burst of cosmic light from a distant celestial source, then strike at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Attack.

10007.name: Light Convergence
10007.effect: Concentrate light into a single point, dealing massive damage but harshly lowering the user's Defense stat.

10008.name: Shine
10008.effect: Damage the opponent with bright light.

10009.name: Bright Beam
10009.effect: Emit a concentraded beam of light at the opponent. This move has a 10% chance of confusing the target.

10010.name: Energy Surge
10010.effect: Radiate a huge wave of energy that damages all foes on the opposing field, while increasing self and allies' Special Attack stat.

10011.name: Dazzling Gleam
10011.effect: Send out a burst of dazzling light at all opposing foes, with a 10% chance of causing target(s) to flinch.

10012.name: Prismatic Wave
10012.effect: Send out a wave of shifting light that has a 20% chance of confusing the target.

10013.name: Radiant Burst
10013.effect: Release a powerful burst of light that deals damage to the opponent, but will be unable to use Light-typed move on next turn.

10014.name: Starfall
10014.effect: Bring the bursting light of a nearby star to crush down, striking everyone around the user, foes and allies.

10015.name: Solar Flare
10015.effect: Unleash a concentraed flare of sunlight at the opponent, with a 20% chance of leaving the target with a burn.

10016.name: Celestial Beam
10016.effect: A high-energy beam from the sky that deals damage to the opponent and has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense.

10017.name: Flash
10017.effect: The user flashes a bright light that harshly lowers the target's accuracy.

10018.name: Flashbang
10018.effect: Blind the opponent with a sudden flash, causing confusion.

10019.name: Aurora Veil
10019.effect: Create a protective veil that reduces the damage from physical and special moves for 5 turns.

10020.name: Safe Haven
10020.effect: Create a protective sanctuary that prevents status condition for 5 turns.

10021.name: Radiant Glow
10021.effect: Heal 50% of the user's HP with a soothing light.

10022.name: Sunlit Grace
10022.effect: Heal all onfield allies' HP by 50% with the power of sunlight.

10023.name: Moonlit Blessing
10023.effect: Heal all onfield allies' status conditions with the gentle light of the moon.

10024.name: Luminous Dance
10024.effect: The user performs an enchanting dance that radiates a beautiful, glowing light. This move restores all onfield allies' HP by 50% and has a 30% chance of confusing the opponent(s).

11001.name: Poison Stringer
11001.effect: A quick stinger attack that deals damage and has a 5% chance of poisoning the target.

11002.name: Poison Tail
11002.effect: Hit the opponent with a poisonous tail. This move has a 10% chance of poisoning the target.

11003.name: Venomous Bite
11003.effect: A bite infused with venom that deals damage to the opponent and has a 10% chance of poisoning the target.

11004.name: Creeping Poison
11004.effect: Strike the opponent with a creeping poison that deals 20% of the original damage at the end of the turn, over the next 3 turns.

11005.name: Poison Jab
11005.effect: A quick jab infused with poison that has a 10% chance of poisoning the target. Consecutive use increases the damage by 10% and chance of poisoning by 5%, but reducing accuracy by 5%.

11006.name: Gunk Shot
11006.effect: Fire a shot of vile gunk at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of poisoning the target.

11007.name: Venomous Barrage
11007.effect: Delivers a rapid series of powerful, venom-infused strikes at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of poisoning the target.

11008.name: Acid Spit
11008.effect: Spit a corrosive acid that deals damage to the opponent and has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

11009.name: Toxic Spray
11009.effect: Spray a cloud of toxic gas that has a 10% chance of poisoning the target.

11010.name: Toxic Wave
11010.effect: Send out a wave of toxic energy that deal damage to all opposing foes and has a 10% chance of poisoning the target(s).

11011.name: Corrode
11011.effect: Create a mist of corrosive poison that deal damage and lower the target's Special Defense stat.

11012.name: Noxious Cloud
11012.effect: Release a cloud of noxious fumes that has a 20% chance of causing the target to become poisoned.

11013.name: Siphon Drain
11013.effect: Absorb the target's life force and restore 50% of the damage as HP to the user. If the target is poisoned, restore 100% of the damage as HP to the user instead.

11014.name: Acidic Beam
11014.effect: Fire a concentrated beam of acid that deal damage and has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat.

11015.name: Sludge Bomb
11015.effect: Hurl an unsanitary sludge at the opponent. This move has a 20% chance of poisoning the target.

11016.name: Baneful Burst
11016.effect: Attack the opponent with biohazardous waste. This move has a 20% chance of lowering the target's stamina by 20 points.

11017.name: Malignant Vortex
11017.effect: Unleash a swirling, malignant cloud of toxic energy that engulfs the target, dealing damage and harshly reducing the target's Attack.

11018.name: Plague
11018.effect: Plague the opponent. This move will poison the target.

11019.name: Blight
11019.effect: Apply a blight to the opponent, reducing the target's Defense stat.

11020.name: Poison Mist
11020.effect: Create a thick mist of poison around the opponent, poisoning the target, and lowering the target's Accuracy stat.

11021.name: Venom Drench
11021.effect: Soak the target in venom, reducing their Attack, Special Attack and Speed stats.

11022.name: Contagion
11022.effect: Poison the opponent. Every turn, opponent(s) next to the target has a 50% chance of getting poisoned too.

11023.name: Toxic Spikes
11023.effect: Lay a trap of poisonous spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing foes that switch into battle.
